strategy: High Risk / High Return - Aggressive Short-Term Stock Picks
analyst_note: Mid-July 2026 is setting up as a prime hunting ground for aggressive traders. AI infrastructure spending continues to accelerate with major hyperscaler capex announcements pushing semiconductor names to new highs on heavy institutional volume. Biotech is heating up with several PDUFA dates clustered in late July, creating binary event setups with asymmetric payoffs. Bitcoin has reclaimed key psychological levels, dragging high-beta crypto proxies like MSTR and COIN into breakout territory with short interest building on both — a classic squeeze setup. Small-cap quantum computing and defense tech names are seeing the most violent momentum rotations of the year as retail and hedge fund flows converge.
market_summary: Risk appetite is firmly elevated with institutional money rotating aggressively into AI chips, crypto proxies, and pre-catalyst biotech while defensive sectors bleed out on low volume.

macro_backdrop.key_risk: A surprise CPI revision or Fed hawkish pivot language could instantly crush risk-on momentum and hammer high-beta names 8-15% in a single session.

picks.name: MicroStrategy Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Pure leveraged Bitcoin proxy with 22% short interest — any BTC surge above $120k triggers a violent squeeze in MSTR shares that can move 25-40% in days.
picks.thesis: MSTR has broken out of a 3-week consolidation range on surging volume as BTC reclaimed $115,000 and institutional Bitcoin ETF inflows hit a 2026 record. With 22% of float short and BTC trending toward $125k resistance, the squeeze fuel is loaded and the fuse is lit.
picks.technical_setup: Broke above $415 resistance on 2.8x average volume Tuesday. RSI at 64 — strong but not overbought. Trading above 20-day and 50-day moving averages. Next resistance at $460-470 from January 2026 highs.
picks.catalyst: Bitcoin momentum above $115k with record ETF inflows driving institutional BTC accumulation; short interest at 22% creates squeeze pressure on any continued BTC rally.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $422. Enter today or tomorrow before momentum accelerates. Do not chase above $438 — wait for a pullback to re-entry if missed.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $475 (conservative target). Let remainder run toward $560 if BTC holds above $118k. Exit ALL shares if BTC drops below $108k regardless of MSTR price.
picks.stop_note: Hard stop if MSTR closes below $388 — that breaks the breakout pattern and signals BTC reversal. Exit all shares immediately, no averaging down.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - can move 12-18% in a single day on BTC news
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $475 to lock profit. Move stop on remaining shares to breakeven ($422). Trail stop up $30 for every $40 MSTR moves higher. Never let winner turn into loss.
picks.risk_factors: BTC drops below $108k would crash this trade immediately. Regulatory crypto news could hit hard. Very high single-day volatility — can gap down 15% on bad BTC overnight.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: MSTR can lose 20-30% as fast as it gains. This is a leveraged BTC bet disguised as a stock. Size tiny.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search MSTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $422  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: IonQ Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Quantum computing leader reporting earnings July 22 with analysts dramatically underestimating government contract revenue — a beat could send shares 30-50% higher in days.
picks.thesis: IONQ is breaking out above its 6-week consolidation at $36-37 on reports of a massive new DoD quantum computing contract worth $180M. Earnings on July 22 are expected to show a significant revenue beat driven by government contracts that sell-side analysts have systematically undermodeled.
picks.technical_setup: Cleared $37.80 resistance Tuesday on 3.1x average volume — classic institutional accumulation breakout. MACD crossed bullish Monday. Trading well above 50-day MA at $32. Next resistance at $44, then $52 from March highs.
picks.catalyst: DoD contract announcement rumored plus earnings report July 22 expected to show 40%+ revenue beat vs lowball consensus estimates of $28M quarterly revenue.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $38.00. Must be in before July 22 earnings. Do not pay more than $40.50 — if it gaps up before entry, wait for a pullback to $38-39 range.
picks.sell_note: Sell 60% of shares at $44 day after earnings if beat confirmed. Hold remaining 40% toward $58 if post-earnings momentum holds. Exit all if stock fades back below $36 post-earnings.
picks.stop_note: If IONQ closes below $34.50 before earnings, the breakout failed — exit all shares immediately. Do not hold a broken breakout into a binary event.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - quantum names move 15-25% on any contract or earnings news
picks.exit_plan: Sell majority into earnings strength. Never hold full position through binary earnings event. Take guaranteed profit at $44, let small portion ride for moonshot.
picks.risk_factors: Earnings miss would crush shares 25-35% immediately. Quantum computing sector remains speculative — institutional selling can be violent. Any DoD contract delay news kills thesis.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Earnings binary event. Stock can drop 30% on a miss. Reduce position size before earnings report.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search IONQ  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $38.00  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: NVIDIA Corporation
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: NVDA is the epicenter of AI infrastructure spending and with multiple hyperscalers just raising capex guidance, a move to new all-time highs in the next 10 days is highly probable with 15-20% upside.
picks.thesis: Microsoft, Amazon, and Meta all raised 2026 AI capex guidance in the past two weeks, directly accelerating Blackwell GPU demand and pushing NVDA estimates higher for the third consecutive month. The stock is consolidating just below all-time highs at $1,100 and any continued hyperscaler spending news breaks it out to $1,200+.
picks.technical_setup: Trading in a tight bull flag between $1,060-$1,100 after the last breakout run. Volume is compressing — a classic coil before explosion. RSI at 61, plenty of room. 20-day MA at $1,020 providing strong support. Break above $1,102 targets $1,250.
picks.catalyst: Continued hyperscaler AI capex announcements plus potential Blackwell ultra chip demand update from NVDA management at upcoming tech conference July 21.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $1,080. Buy on any intraday dip to that level. Do not chase above $1,105 — the risk/reward deteriorates meaningfully above that entry.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $1,220 to lock in 13% gain. Trail stop on rest. If NVDA breaks above $1,280 on volume, hold toward $1,350. Exit all before NVDA's own earnings if they fall within holding window.
picks.stop_note: Below $1,005 the bull flag is broken and larger correction likely — exit all shares. This is a major support level from the prior breakout base.
picks.volatility_profile: High - moves 4-8% on single AI news items despite large cap status
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $1,220. Move stop to $1,080 (breakeven). Trail stop $60 below price for remainder. Exit all if AI capex narrative cracks.
picks.risk_factors: Any hyperscaler capex cut or China export restriction escalation could drop NVDA 10-15% instantly. Antitrust risk remains. High absolute price means small share counts for most investors.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK despite large cap status: NVDA can move $80-120 in a day. Even at 1-2% portfolio allocation, volatility is extreme.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search NVDA  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares (or fractional)  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $1080  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Viking Therapeutics Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Phase 3 obesity trial readout expected late July — a positive result in the red-hot GLP-1 weight loss space could send shares 60-100% higher overnight.
picks.thesis: VKTX is running a Phase 3 trial for VK2735 (oral GLP-1) with data readout expected by July 29 — entering the most competitive and lucrative drug market in history. With Eli Lilly and Novo Nordisk dominating injectable GLP-1s, a successful oral formulation data package could trigger immediate buyout speculation and send shares parabolic.
picks.technical_setup: Stock basing tightly at $54-60 for 4 weeks — classic pre-catalyst coil. Volume has been quietly increasing suggesting smart money accumulation. 200-day MA at $48 provides deep support. RSI neutral at 52 — lots of room to run. Break above $62 ignites the move.
picks.catalyst: Phase 3 VK2735 oral obesity trial data readout expected July 28-29, 2026. Positive efficacy and safety data could trigger acquisition conversations with major pharma.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $57.00. Must enter well before data readout. If stock runs above $65 before data, consider trimming position size — risk/reward shifts. Buy the base, not the spike.
picks.sell_note: If data is positive: sell 40% immediately at open for whatever price you get. Hold remaining 60% for buyout premium toward $115. If data is negative: sell ALL shares at market immediately — do not hold.
picks.stop_note: If stock breaks $50 before data (unusual selling suggesting data leak fears), exit all immediately. Otherwise hold through the binary event with pre-planned exit.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - biotech binary event, 50% move in either direction possible overnight
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAX — binary event risk
picks.exit_plan: This is a binary event. Have your exit plan BEFORE data drops. Positive data: sell partial immediately, hold small position for acquisition premium. Negative data: sell all at market open, take the loss, move on.
picks.risk_factors: Trial failure sends stock to $20-28 range — a 55-65% loss. Data could be mixed (partial success) creating unclear reaction. FDA may require additional trials. Market risk-off could suppress even positive reaction.
picks.warning: EXTREME BINARY RISK: This stock can lose 50-65% overnight on failed trial data. Only invest money you can afford to lose entirely. Keep position tiny.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search VKTX  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $57.00  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Coinbase Global Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: 25% short interest against a ripping crypto market and earnings on July 29 creates a perfect storm — short sellers are trapped and covering into a rising stock.
picks.thesis: COIN is a triple catalyst setup: BTC above $115k driving record trading volumes and revenue, 25% short interest creating massive covering pressure, and Q2 earnings July 29 expected to show explosive revenue beats driven by institutional crypto adoption. Short sellers have been wrong for weeks and the squeeze is building.
picks.technical_setup: COIN broke through $242 resistance Monday on 2.5x average volume. RSI at 67 — strong momentum. MACD histogram expanding bullishly. 50-day MA at $218 well below price. Next resistance at $272 from February 2026 highs. Short squeeze could blast through that level.
picks.catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings July 29 expected to show 65-80% revenue beat vs consensus as crypto trading volumes surged in Q2. Plus ongoing BTC institutional inflows boosting transaction revenue daily.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $245 on any intraday pullback. Do not chase above $255. If BTC drops overnight, check for a better entry at $238-240 range before adding.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $278 to lock gains. Sell remaining 50% into earnings if stock gaps up hard on July 29. If earnings disappoint, exit ALL shares at market immediately.
picks.stop_note: Close below $225 breaks the breakout structure — exit all shares. This also implies BTC may be reversing which removes the entire thesis.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - crypto exchange stocks can move 10-15% in a day
picks.exit_plan: Sell half before earnings to de-risk. Hold small position through earnings only if you can absorb a 20% loss. Trail stop aggressively once above $272.
picks.risk_factors: BTC reversal crushes COIN immediately. Regulatory action from SEC or CFTC could gap stock down 20%. Earnings miss despite good volumes if expenses surprise to upside.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Crypto exchange stocks are among the most volatile equities on the market. BTC risk is amplified 2-3x in COIN shares.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search COIN  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $245  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Defense AI contracts accelerating, US commercial AIP adoption exploding, and Q2 earnings July 28 with a history of massive beats — Palantir is the most dangerous momentum stock in the market right now.
picks.thesis: PLTR has been making higher lows and higher highs all quarter as US government AI spending accelerates following the National AI Defense Act and commercial AIP platform adoption hits record customer counts. Q2 earnings July 28 expected to show the first quarter of GAAP profitability exceeding $200M — a potential re-rating event for the stock.
picks.technical_setup: PLTR broke above $102 on strong volume last week and has held the level all week — textbook breakout retest and hold. RSI at 63, MACD bullish crossover on daily. 20-day MA at $96 rising sharply. $112 is the next key resistance, break above targets $125-130.
picks.catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings July 28 expected to show record US commercial revenue growth 40%+ YoY, GAAP profit milestone, and potential announcement of new large defense AI contract.
picks.buy_note: Limit at $104. Enter within 2 trading days — momentum traders are already positioning. Do not pay above $108. Ideal entry on any morning dip to $103-104.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $118 day of or day after earnings if stock reacts positively. Hold 50% toward $140 if institutional upgrades follow earnings beat. Exit all if stock drops below $96 post-earnings.
picks.stop_note: Hard stop below $95 — breaks the entire bull structure. Below this level suggests broader tech selloff or PLTR-specific negative news. Exit all shares without hesitation.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - PLTR regularly moves 8-15% on earnings
picks.exit_plan: Pre-earnings: sell 30% to reduce binary risk. Post-earnings beat: sell another 40% into strength. Hold 30% for trend continuation. Never hold full position through earnings.
picks.risk_factors: Valuation remains extreme at 70x revenue — any guidance miss sends stock down 20-25%. Government contract delays or spending cuts would hurt. High expectations mean even good results can disappoint.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: PLTR trades at extreme multiples and is priced for perfection. Any disappointment creates violent selloff. Position size accordingly.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search PLTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $104  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: SoundHound AI Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: 38% short interest on a stock with major automotive and restaurant AI contract wins — the most explosive squeeze setup in the small-cap AI space right now.
picks.thesis: SOUN has been systematically winning enterprise AI voice contracts in automotive (BMW, Stellantis), restaurant chains, and healthcare while short sellers pile in betting the company burns cash too fast. Any major new contract announcement or positive revenue pre-announcement would ignite a devastating short squeeze in a stock with 38% of float sold short.
picks.technical_setup: Basing at $11.50-12.80 for 3 weeks — tight coil with declining sell volume. Buyers are absorbing all the selling. RSI at 48 — neutral and ready to launch. Above $13.20 triggers the squeeze and likely brings $15-16 quickly. Very high relative volume on up days vs down days recently.
picks.catalyst: Expected new enterprise contract announcement within 2 weeks plus potential revenue pre-announcement ahead of August earnings. Any positive news in 38% short interest name triggers automatic squeeze.
picks.buy_note: Limit at $12.20. Small-cap AI name — use limit orders only, never market orders. Buy in tranches: half at $12.20, half at $11.80 if it dips. Do not chase above $13.00.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $15.00 immediately if squeeze triggers — do not get greedy. Sell remaining 50% at $19.50 or trail a tight stop. Squeezes reverse fast — take money when it's there.
picks.stop_note: Below $10.80 the base is broken and squeeze thesis dies. Exit all shares immediately. Small caps can fall 20-30% fast once support breaks.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - small cap squeeze candidates can move 30-50% in 48 hours
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAX — small cap squeeze is highest risk category
picks.exit_plan: Squeeze plays require instant execution. Have sell orders ready to go. Sell into strength aggressively — squeezes reverse without warning. Lock profit fast.
picks.risk_factors: Cash burn rate is real concern — dilutive equity raise would crush shares 25-40%. Squeeze may not materialize if no positive catalyst arrives. Small cap liquidity can be thin on the way down.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: Small cap short squeeze plays can lose 30-40% as fast as they gain. This is speculation at its highest level. Keep position tiny.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search SOUN  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $12.20  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Rocket Lab USA Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Space economy spending accelerating with DoD contracts, new Neutron rocket development on track, and institutional momentum making RKLB the highest-conviction space pure-play available to retail investors.
picks.thesis: Rocket Lab has successfully separated itself from the pack of space SPACs with actual launch revenue, profitable satellite manufacturing contracts, and the Neutron heavy-lift rocket program now fully funded. A new DoD launch services contract expected to be announced Q3 2026 could be the catalyst that breaks RKLB to new 52-week highs and attracts institutional upgrades.
picks.technical_setup: RKLB consolidating in an ascending triangle between $22-25 for 5 weeks. Volume declining on pullbacks (bullish). RSI at 58. 20-day MA at $22.80 rising. Break above $25.50 with volume targets $30-32 rapidly. Pattern is tight and coiled.
picks.catalyst: Anticipated DoD multi-launch contract worth $200M+ expected to be announced late July 2026. Plus competitor SpaceX launch backlog pressure driving customer diversification toward Rocket Lab.
picks.buy_note: Limit at $24.00 on any pullback. The ascending triangle is mature — breakout could come any day. Enter before the move, not during. Do not pay above $25.50 for initial entry.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $28.50 on breakout confirmation. Hold 50% for $36 if DoD contract is large and institutional upgrades follow. Trail stop $2 below price once above $28.
picks.stop_note: Close below $21.50 breaks the ascending triangle — pattern failed, exit all shares. Ascending triangles that fail often drop sharply — do not hold.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - space sector names move 10-20% on contract news
picks.exit_plan: Sell 50% at triangle breakout target of $28.50. Raise stop to $24 (breakeven) on remaining shares. Let contract news drive the rest. Do not give back more than 25% of peak gain.
picks.risk_factors: Contract announcement delayed or awarded to competitor kills the trade. Space sector is dependent on government spending priorities that can shift. Neutron rocket any setback would be severely negative.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Space stocks are highly speculative and dependent on government contracts and launch successes. Single events can move stock 20% in either direction.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search RKLB  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $24.00  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Upstart Holdings Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: AI lending volume exploding as rate cuts accelerate consumer credit demand — analysts have dramatically underestimated Q2 loan origination volumes and a massive earnings beat July 29 could send shares 35-50% higher.
picks.thesis: Upstart's AI lending platform thrives in declining rate environments, and with the Fed having cut rates 3 times since Q4 2025, consumer and auto loan originations have surged dramatically in Q2. Analyst consensus estimates of $150M Q2 revenue are based on stale models — actual origination volume data suggests $190-210M is more likely, setting up a 25-40% revenue beat.
picks.technical_setup: UPST broke above a 6-week downtrend line at $64 last Friday on above-average volume. First higher high in 8 weeks. RSI recovering from oversold at 54. 50-day MA at $58 well below — lots of air below means tight stop is critical. Resistance at $78 from May highs.
picks.catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings July 29 expected to dramatically beat lowball consensus estimates as AI-driven loan originations surge in declining interest rate environment. Rate sensitivity creates earnings leverage.
picks.buy_note: Limit at $67.00. Enter on any morning weakness. This is an earnings play so position must be established before July 25 minimum. Do not pay above $71.
picks.sell_note: Sell 60% immediately after earnings if beat confirmed and stock gaps up. Hold 40% for $105 target if guidance is strong. If earnings miss: sell ALL at market open — no excuses.
picks.stop_note: Below $59 the trend reversal is invalidated — exit all shares. UPST has been volatile in both directions and a breakdown here could revisit $45-50.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - UPST has historically moved 30-50% on earnings in either direction
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAX — high short interest plus binary earnings event
picks.exit_plan: This is primarily an earnings bet. Sell majority into strength immediately after earnings reaction. Do not hold a full position waiting for $105 — take the guaranteed gain at $82 on most shares.
picks.risk_factors: Any deterioration in credit quality data spooks investors. If Fed pauses rate cuts, UPST origination thesis weakens. High short interest means miss creates violent unwind to $45-50 range.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: UPST has lost 40-60% in single sessions on earnings misses previously. This is a high-conviction but high-danger earnings bet. Keep position at 1% max.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search UPST  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $67.00  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Phase 3 cardiovascular RNAi drug data readout in late July could validate their entire pipeline and attract major pharma partnership — stock has been basing for months and is coiled for a breakout.
picks.thesis: ARWR's plozasiran (ARO-APOC3) Phase 3 PALISADE trial data is expected July 28 — a cardiovascular drug targeting severe hypertriglyceridemia in a billion-dollar market. Competitor drug approvals in adjacent lipid disorders have validated the category, and positive data would likely trigger immediate partnership discussions with major pharma interested in their RNA interference platform.
picks.technical_setup: Stock has been quietly building a base at $28-33 for 10 weeks — accumulation pattern visible on OBV indicator rising while price flat. 200-day MA at $29 providing support. RSI at 50 — neutral and uncoiled. Breakout above $33.50 targets $42-45 rapidly pre-data.
picks.catalyst: Phase 3 PALISADE trial primary endpoint readout for plozasiran expected July 28, 2026. Positive cardiovascular efficacy data targets FDA filing and potential $2B+ market opportunity in severe hypertriglyceridemia.
picks.buy_note: Limit at $31.50. Enter this week — data readout is less than 2 weeks away and pre-catalyst positioning should begin now. Do not pay above $34 for initial position.
picks.sell_note: Positive data: sell 40% at open for whatever price. Hold 60% for partnership announcement premium toward $58. Negative data: sell ALL at market open immediately, do not wait for bounce.
picks.stop_note: Pre-data stop at $26.50 — if unusual selling occurs before readout, insiders may know something. Exit all shares. Better to miss the trade than take a 50% loss.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - Phase 3 binary event with 50-70% move potential in either direction
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAX — pure binary event
picks.exit_plan: Binary event rules: decide in advance exactly what you will do on positive AND negative data. Sell partial into any pre-data run. Have market sell order ready for data day. No hesitation on negative result.
picks.risk_factors: Phase 3 failure drops stock to $12-16 range — 50-60% loss. Even partial success (meets secondary but misses primary) creates confused market reaction. Biotech data is inherently binary and unpredictable.
picks.warning: EXTREME BINARY RISK: Biotech Phase 3 data readouts are coin-flip events with asymmetric magnitude. You can lose 50-60% overnight. Position must be 1% max of portfolio.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search ARWR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $31.50  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

news_signals.why: Every dollar of hyperscaler AI capex eventually flows through NVDA GPU purchases. This single catalyst justifies the NVDA long position more than any chart pattern.

news_signals.why: Direct BTC price catalyst drives MSTR higher as a leveraged BTC proxy. Record ETF inflows signal sustained institutional demand not just retail speculation.

news_signals.why: Government validation of IONQ's quantum networking technology ahead of earnings removes key bear thesis and sets up massive earnings beat on contract revenue recognition.

daily_wisdom: The money is made in the entry, not the exit — but the money is KEPT in the exit. Size your position so you can sleep at night, take your profit when it's there, and cut your loss before it becomes a disaster. The best traders aren't the ones who are always right — they're the ones who are never catastrophically wrong.
risk_warning: EXTREME RISK: Every pick on this list is a highly speculative, high-volatility stock that can lose 20-65% rapidly and without warning. Biotech binary events can halve your investment overnight. Short squeezes can reverse violently. Momentum breaks can become momentum crashes. Only allocate money you can afford to lose entirely to these positions. Maximum 1-2% of your total portfolio per position. Diversify across multiple picks — never concentrate. This is not financial advice. These are educational examples of aggressive trading strategies. Always do your own research. Buy shares only — no options, no margin, no leverage.
